title: sideritis incana var. sericea
intro: Sideritis incana var. sericea, also known as mountain tea or sericeous wood sage, is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It is a member of the mint family and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sideritis incana var. sericea are numerous and include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried extract, and is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and expectorant properties.
